title: Nashik Teen Dies Minutes After Tetanus Shot, Family Blames Vaccine
content: After receiving the TD injection from the doctors, they were walking back home, when she started bleeding from the nose and collapsed on the road. She was immediately taken to the district hospital, where doctors declared her dead.

title: "Verify Before You Amplify": Army Launches X Account To Counter Fake News
content: Earlier on June 1, the Indian government debunked false claims circulating on social media and warned about an AI-generated deepfake video of the Chief of the Army Staff.

title: Arvind Kejriwal's Hindu Outreach In Punjab As AAP Navigates Sikh Discontent
content: Punjab's politics has traditionally revolved around Sikh institutions, agrarian issues and regional identity. However, electoral arithmetic tells a more nuanced story.

title: India-US Trade Deal "Close", Tariff Edge Over Competitors Key: Piyush Goyal
content: Piyush Goyal added that the framework or contours of the agreement with the US were finalised and announced on February 6 this year, and bot teams have been working since then to finalise the fine print.

title: On Camera, 3 Ride Motorcycle Wrong Way Near Bengaluru, Car Rams Them
content: The deceased has been identified as Anita (42), a resident of Gauribidanur. She was declared dead upon being brought to a hospital.

title: 'I'll Kill You': Uddhav Sena Rebel Threatens Journalists, Eknath Shinde Reacts
content: Sanjay Dina Patil, who recently joined Eknath Shinde's Shiv Sena, threatened journalists and darted insults and expletives at them.

title: Passport Valid Document For Voter Roll Revision: Election Commission
content: During the Bihar SIR, Assam's special revision, and subsequent phases of poll roll revision, passports have consistently been listed as one of the 12 documents that individuals can submit.

title: Gamers Relieved With Minimal Price Hike After Grand Theft Auto VI Preorder
content: Predicted to be the biggest-selling cultural product of all time, speculation had been rife that "GTA VI" would cost players far more than a typical high-end title.

title: "Who Tied Hands Of CBI?" Court Slams Probe Agency Over RG Kar Investigation
content: As directed by the division bench of Justice Shampa Sarkar and Justice Tirthankar Ghosh, the CBI submitted a progress report on Thursday. After examining it, both judges criticised the agency's investigation.

title: Delhi High Court Allows 15-Year-Old Rape Survivor To End 28-Week Pregnancy
content: The bench further directed AIIMS Delhi to preserve the foetus's tissue for DNA testing, which would be required in the criminal case.

title: Death Count In Tamil Nadu Ammonia Gas Leak Rises To 11
content: The state government on Thursday announced that 67 individuals are still undergoing medical treatment following the June 21.

title: Car Lifted 40 Feet, 'Blown Up' In Madhya Pradesh During Muharram Procession
content: According to police, the Muharram procession had been taken out from the Adan locality of Badnagar when the stunt was performed in front of a large gathering.

title: PM Modi To Visit Seychelles From June 27-29, For National Day Celebrations
content: A contingent of the Indian armed forces, along with two ships of the Indian Navy, will participate in the celebrations, the Ministry of External Affairs said.

title: Talking To A Man At Night No Grounds To Question Woman's Character: Court
content: "The Indian society no longer remains a primitive society wherein a woman talking with a man is considered to be a taboo," the judge said.

title: Security Guard Reveals Siya Goyal's First Words After Killing Ketan Agarwal
content: According to police, Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary had been in contact for around six months, exchanging 2,004 phone calls and spending approximately 238 hours speaking to each other.

title: Jammu Hotels Roll Out Mega Discounts To Attract Amarnath Yatra Pilgrims
content: Jammu's hotel association has announced up to 30 per cent off on advance bookings to boost pilgrim stays in Jammu ahead of the annual Amarnath Yatra, which starts July 3.

title: 'Mask Used To Create Fake Footage': Bhagwant Mann On Video Row
content: Bhagwant Mann, at a press conference, said a close examination of the footage reveals clear signs of manipulation.

title: Hurting Mulayam Singh's Legacy: Yogi Adityanath Mocks SP-Congress Alliance
content: Yogi Adityanath said: "Remember, whenever the SP wanted to enter an alliance with the Congress, the late Mulayam Singh used to object to it. He used to say there should be no alliance with the Congress"

title: 'You'd Get A Million Votes In Delhi': Giorgia Meloni Recalls 2023 India Visit
content: Giorgia Meloni visited India twice in 2023, first for the 8th edition of 'Raisina Dialogue' in March and later for the G20 Summit in September.

title: How Oil Tankers Crossed Hormuz Strait Despite Threats From Iran Guards
content: The development comes as tensions rise between Iran and the United States over their interim accord aimed at permanently ending the Iran war.

title: In a first, Canada admits Khalistanis planted bomb on Air India 'Kanishka' Flight 182
content: Canadian prime minister Mark Carney on Tuesday bombing the "deadliest attack in our country’s history", saying that Canada stands against violent extremism in all its forms. "Forty-one years ago today, the bombing of Air India Flight 182 claimed 329 innocent lives, including 268 Canadians. It remains the deadliest terrorist attack in Canada’s history," the prime minister said in a statement.

title: Ram Temple donation row: UP Police files FIR; 8 booked as probe widens
content: The FIR was lodged by the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust member Krishna Mohan at the Ram Janmabhoomi police station under Sections 306 (theft by clerk or servant), 316 (criminal breach of trust), 317 (cheating) and 61 (criminal conspiracy) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), police sources said. According to the complaint, the accused allegedly embezzled donations offered by devotees at the Ram Temple and misappropriated trust funds through a criminal conspiracy.

title: Mamdani revolution: Are Democrats finally getting their own MAGA moment?
content: In a pivotal turn for New York City's politics, endorsed candidates of Zohran Mamdani have triumphed in the Democratic congressional primaries. This win signifies a reshaping of the political scene, highlighting a burgeoning progressive momentum that confronts the traditional party machinery. The implications on future elections and the broader national agenda of the Democratic Party are now sparking significant discussions, drawing parallels to the MAGA shift within the Republican Party.

title: Apple hikes iPad, Mac prices in India as AI-driven memory crunch bites: Check new cost
content: Apple has significantly hiked prices for its Mac and iPad models in India, attributing the surge to soaring memory and storage component costs driven by the global AI boom.  The MacBook Pro lineup has seen the steepest increases, with some models jumping by as much as Rs 70,000.  Apple stated it absorbed these rising costs for as long as possible before passing them to consumers.

title: Video: How Siya Goyal, 'lover' Chetan plotted Ketan Agarwal's killing over coffee
content: A chilling plot unfolded as a fiancée and her lover meticulously planned a real estate director's murder. CCTV footage revealed their cafe meeting, where they finalized pushing him from Lohagad Fort. Despite multiple failed attempts and a staged accident, the couple was apprehended. Their extensive phone calls and a history of sabotage exposed the calculated conspiracy, leaving families devastated and prompting political intervention.

title: 'Tried to do as much research as we can on him': Tucker stunned by Sooryavanshi hype
content: Ireland captain Lorcan Tucker expressed awe at 15-year-old Indian batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's rapid rise, calling it "pretty incredible" for the modern era. Tucker highlighted the excitement Sooryavanshi generates, especially among Ireland's Indian community, and acknowledged his potential as a global role model.  Despite facing a tough series against a formidable Indian side, Tucker believes early wickets will be crucial for Ireland's chances.

title: Days after Meta CTO flagged low morale, company reverses two employee policies
content: Meta has reversed its controversial policy forcing engineers into an AI task force, allowing employees personal choice after widespread backlash. This move follows recent mass layoffs and an AI reorganisation that sparked unrest. The company also acknowledged past mistakes in its aggressive AI push, with CTO Andrew Bosworth admitting morale is at historic lows.  Concerns over an AI tracking tool have also led to its pause.

title: Slippery hands: India drop four catches in six overs as fielding woes continue
content: Bangladesh captain Nigar Sultana won the toss and chose to bat. India, coming into the match after a defeat against South Africa, made two changes, bringing in Radha Yadav and Renuka Thakur for Prema Yadhav and Arundhati Reddy. Bangladesh retained the same XI that beat Pakistan in their previous game.

title: Tech billionaire’s French Palace-inspired 'Sand Castle' is now selling at price cut
content: Tech magnate Darwin Deason's opulent "Sand Castle" mansion in La Jolla, inspired by Versailles, is now on the market for $87.5 million after an initial listing at $108 million.  This extravagant 13,000-square-foot estate boasts imported marble, gold accents, and even sand from Augusta National. Despite the price reduction, it remains San Diego's most expensive residential listing, aiming to break the $100 million barrier.

title: India A seize control: Sudharsan’s ton, Jurel-Rasheed stand leave SL A chasing shadows
content: India A dominated the opening day of their unofficial Test against Sri Lanka A in Galle, reaching a strong 333/4. Sai Sudharsan led the charge with a brilliant 132, anchoring the innings. Captain Dhruv Jurel (68 not out) and Shaik Rasheed (53 not out) continued the momentum with an unbeaten 116-run partnership, putting India A firmly in command.

title: Pune murder case: Siya's father hospitalised as Ketan death probe intensifies
content: A sensational Lohagad Fort murder case has gripped Maharashtra, with a 20-year-old woman and her alleged lover arrested for pushing her fiancé into a 400-foot gorge. Investigators claim a months-long conspiracy, including prior murder attempts and passport sabotage, led to the fatal incident. The accused, who allegedly lured the victim to the fort under the guise of a birthday celebration, remain in police custody.

title: NBA trade rumor: Lakers eye Cavaliers center to support Luka Doncic
content: The Los Angeles Lakers would reportedly pursue a sign-and-trade sending LeBron James to the Cleveland Cavaliers for center Jarrett Allen, ESPN's Brian Windhorst said June 24, 2026 on ESPN Cleveland radio. James, an unrestricted free agent carrying a roughly $59.5 million cap hold, made $52.6 million last season. The proposal has gained traction because Allen would address the Lakers' long-standing need at center while complementing Luka Doncic and newly re-signed Austin Reaves.

title: EPFO 3.0: ATM, UPI-linked withdrawals & more - what reforms mean for subscribers
content: EPFO 3.0 aims to deliver quicker automated claim settlements, instant withdrawals, multilingual self-service facilities and seamless payroll-integrated contributions.

title: 'I just hope': Dravid issues 'fine line' warning for Sooryavanshi as India debut looms
content: As excitement around the youngster continues to grow, former India coach and Rajasthan Royals head coach Rahul Dravid has shared his thoughts on the teenager.

title: Siya Goyal, Chetan Chaudhary now blame each other for plotting Ketan's murder
content: A shocking murder plot has unraveled in Pune after a real estate director's death at Lohagad Fort. His fiancée and her lover, initially accused of the crime, are now pointing fingers at each other. Investigators revealed a meticulously planned conspiracy involving multiple failed attempts before the fatal push, with the couple allegedly driven by an unwillingness to marry and a desire to avoid family disgrace.

title: Several injured as CPM, BJP councillors clash at Thiruvananthapuram mayor's office
content: A scuffle erupted at Thiruvananthapuram Corporation as CPI(M) and BJP councillors clashed outside the Mayor's office. The CPI(M) demanded the resignation of a BJP councillor arrested in an assault case and questioned the validity of a recent oath taken by BJP members. The protest escalated when CPI(M) councillors allegedly blocked the Mayor's entry, leading to injuries among several councillors, mostly women. Police intervened to allow the Mayor access.

title: Mexico's Ochoa joins Ronaldo and Messi, becomes first goalkeeper in history to ...
content: The Mexico goalkeeper reached the milestone during his side's final Group A match against the Czech Republic in Mexico City on Wednesday.

title: Meet ‘Kashi Ki Lata’ Mangala Kapoor: Acid attack survivor who won a Padma Shri
content: A childhood acid attack irrevocably altered Mangala Kapoor's life at 12, leading to numerous surgeries. Yet, she found solace and strength in classical music, transforming it into her identity. Her dedication led to a distinguished academic career and teaching at Banaras Hindu University. Now, the Padma Shri award recognizes a remarkable journey of resilience, where her voice and talent have triumphed over adversity, defining her beyond her past trauma.

title: 'I will kill you': Shiv Sena MP Sanjay Dina Patil, among 6 UBT defectors, abuses journalists
content: Shiv Sena MP Sanjay Dina Patil allegedly threatened journalists with dire consequences when questioned about his daughter's political stance and previous controversial remarks. Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde intervened, urging Patil to express regret for his outburst, suggesting it was a reaction to personal attacks. Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis stated he would gather more information before commenting on the incident.

title: 'Aim isn't to play well': Brazil coach Ancelotti's blunt statement after 3-0 win
content: After opening their campaign with a 1-1 draw against Morocco, Brazil have followed it up with two wins and finished top of Group C.

title: FIFA World Cup: How the best eight third-placed teams will be determined — Explained
content: The FIFA World Cup 2026's group stage is nearing its end, with 13 teams already securing spots in the Round of 32. A thrilling race is underway for the eight best third-placed teams to also advance. FIFA's ranking system, prioritising points, goal difference, goals scored, conduct, and FIFA rankings, will determine these crucial qualifiers. Several high-stakes matches remain, promising to finalise the knockout picture by Sunday morning.

title: From Spike to Hellfire: Inside India’s layered tank-killers
content: India's Army is bolstering its anti-tank capabilities with a mix of legacy and modern missile systems. From reliable Russian Konkurs and Franco-German MILAN to advanced Israeli Spike, the infantry is well-equipped. Main battle tanks and Apache helicopters also contribute with integrated guided missiles and aerial precision strikes, ensuring a robust defense against evolving armored threats across diverse terrains.

title: US holds Valiant Shield wargames in western Pacific; India deepens Vietnam push
content: Valiant Shield 2026, a major multinational military exercise, is underway across the Indo-Pacific, involving the US and allies like Australia, Japan, Canada, and New Zealand. This drill emphasizes advanced capabilities and interoperability in air, land, sea, space, and cyber domains. Meanwhile, the Indian Navy is bolstering maritime partnerships with a recent port call in Vietnam, reinforcing regional security cooperation and India's commitment to a free and open Indo-Pacific.

title: West Bengal's Banglar Awaas Yojana: Eligibility, required documents and how to apply
content: The Banglar Awaas Yojana in West Bengal aims to provide a sturdy home to individuals lacking proper housing or living in unsafe conditions. Eligible participants can receive Rs 1.3 lakh distributed over several installments and also benefit from 95 days of unskilled labor wages. Applicants must not own a pucca house and must be listed on the Permanent Waiting List from 2011.

title: $1.5 billion-crypto connection: How North Korean heist ended in Iran's central bank
content: A massive crypto heist, initially linked to North Korea, has unraveled a complex financial web connecting to Iran's central bank. Investigators discovered stolen funds moving through wallets associated with Iran's central bank before reaching CoinEx, a key exchange facilitating Iranian crypto users. This revelation underscores the growing role of digital assets in Iran and the challenges in monitoring cross-border transactions.

title: India vs Ireland T20Is timings changed ahead of Sooryavanshi's expected debut
content: Cricket Ireland has shifted the start times for both T20Is against India to 1:30 pm local time, an hour earlier than usual. This adjustment aims to avoid a direct clash with India's crucial Women's T20 World Cup match against Australia on June 28. Broadcasters have agreed to the revised schedule, ensuring fans can catch more of both exciting encounters.

title: Russia denies report of pressuring Belarus to deepen role in Ukraine war
content: Belarus served as a staging ground for Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022, allowing Russian forces to launch their offensive from its territory. The conflict has now entered its fifth year. Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskyy has repeatedly said in recent months that he believes Moscow is seeking to draw Belarus further into the war.

title: Megha Ghadge on Shraddha Kapoor's 'Eetha' teaser, says she performed Lavani while pregnant
content: Lavani artist Megha Ghadge has voiced profound respect for Shraddha Kapoor's portrayal of Vithabai Narayangaonkar, describing the teaser as both emotional and impactful. Ghadge, an award recipient in Vithabai's honor, shares a passion for performance and believes the film will introduce the iconic artist's legacy to a broader audience. She also notes the vital need to maintain Lavani's genuine essence as the genre evolves.

title: DDA releases data on vacant lands under its control in big transparency push
content: The Delhi Development Authority (DDA) has recently launched a new initiative to promote transparency by displaying information about vacant land parcels on its official website. This development follows Supreme Court rulings affirming land acquisition procedures. Citizens are encouraged to access this data for informational purposes only, as it is not intended for legal or commercial use. Regular updates to this information will be provided by DDA.

title: What Indian basketball learnt from Asia's best at the NBA Rising Stars Invitational
content: Japan. South Korea. China. Australia. Through the first three days of the NBA Rising Stars Invitational, the same basketball nations have continued to separate themselves from the rest. Watching India's lone representatives up close offered perhaps the clearest explanation why.

title: FIR against Army commanding officer, 40 soldiers for 'assaulting' cops at J&K police station
content: Jammu and Kashmir Police have registered a case against several Army personnel, including a commanding officer, for allegedly storming a police station in Kishtwar. The incident reportedly followed the seizure of a private vehicle owned by an Army official for traffic violations. The FIR details an assault on police personnel, damage to government property, and accusations of an attempt to cause fatal injuries.

title: Bangladesh, China agree to deepen Teesta cooperation during Rahman's Beijing visit
content: Rahman travelled to the Chinese city of Dalian from Kuala Lumpur on June 22 after attending the World Economic Forum in Malaysia, which marked his first overseas visit since assuming office earlier this year. He later travelled by high-speed train to Beijing on Wednesday and is scheduled to meet President Xi Jinping, Premier Li Qiang and other senior Chinese leaders.

title: AP Drone Corp. inks pact for developing drone delivery network across Amaravati
content: Bengaluru-based aerospace company will work with stakeholders across healthcare, logistics and e-commerce sectors to enable drone operations connecting Amaravati, Vijayawada and Guntur

title: Nellore all set for ‘Rottela Panduga’ festival
content: Ahead of the five-day festival starting on June 26, Nellore Rural MLA inaugurateds boat ride service at Boating Club located near Bara Shahid Dargah

title: Restored east gopuram of Kerala’s Vadakkunnathan Temple to be dedicated on June 26
content: The restoration, undertaken as an offering by the Venugopalaswamy Trust under the TVS Group, was carried out with the approval of the Archaeological Survey of India, following traditional conservation practices to preserve the monument’s original character

title: Three-pronged strategy to tackle rising human-wildlife conflict in Kerala
content: Forest and Wildlife Minister Shibu Baby John announces that the State government will prepare a comprehensive action plan to address the issue

title: AGICL invites bids for ₹958-crore twin office towers at Amaravati Quantum Valley
content: The proposed structures are expected to provide high-quality office infrastructure for companies and institutions associated with quantum computing, advanced technologies, research, and innovation-driven industries

title: Kudumbashree adds natural colours to Onam apparel
content: Women tribespeople in the Parambikulam region of Palakkad district have been trained in dyeing organic cloth using natural pigments for Kudumbashree’s premium clothing line ‘Triband.’

title: CBSE’s move to make vocational education mandatory for class IX sparks concern among city schools
content: CBSE, under its NCF-SE, has introduced Kaushal Vikas (Vocational education) as a mandatory subject for class IX students, rather than keeping it optional

title: Tirupati police detain intruder after panic erupts at school
content: The incident happened at Sri Vijetha school in city’s Akkarampalli locality, where from Badvel town in Kadapa district, now living in Mysuru, reportedly entered the premises in the pretext of enquiring details about admission and fee structure

title: Husk to hope: coconut park begins to stir again in Kuttiyadi
content: The project, conceived during the tenure of the Oommen Chandy government, is being implemented by the Kerala State Industrial Development Corporation

title: Ram temple donation row: FIR lodged over ‘embezzlement of donations’
content: The case is registered following a preliminary investigation by the Special Investigation Team (SIT) and after a written complaint filed by Krishna Mohan, a member of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Trust

title: Govt. failed SHG women on interest subvention on loans, alleges Jagan
content: Women beneficiaries have been deprived of nearly ₹6,000 crore over the past two years, says the YSRCP chief

title: Vijayawada MP calls for greater awareness among farmers on crop diversification
content: Farmers will be encouraged to shift to horticultural crops by linking these to Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme, says Kesineni Sivanath

title: Tamil Nadu aims at ₹1,000-crore investment in technical textiles by 2030
content: The State will focus on textiles used in automobile, healthcare, sports, agriculture and construction sectors, says Principal Secretary, Department of Handlooms, Textiles, Khadi and Handicrafts

title: Three States have arrived at ‘historic consensus’, says D.K. Shivakumar as new gates of Tungabhadra dam are inaugurated
content: Shivakumar said Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh and Telangana discussed key concerns raised by farmers, including the proposed Navali balancing reservoir, and the need to remove accumulated silt from the reservoir to improve water conservation and storage

title: Withdrawal amendment to FCRA Rules: CM
content: Satheesan says the amendment created conditions in which non-governmental organisations could not function in the country

title: FCRA rules mark shift from regulating foreign contribution to voluntary organisations: CPI(M)
content: CPI-M's Rajya Sabha leader John Brittas said the amendments represent "one of the most far-reaching executive interventions in the functioning of India's voluntary sector" since the enactment of the FCRA, 2010

title: Chittoor SP warns action against those using narcotic substances
content: Participating in a anti-drug awareness rally, Tushar Dudi says police are strengthening surveillance, conducting vehicle checks at border points, and keeping watch on suspicious persons

title: Kharif farming gathers pace in Rayalaseema districts amid El Nino concerns
content: Officials of the Agriculture department say that scattered showers have facilitated initial land preparation, but only sustained rainfall conditions could determine sowing decisions in the predominantly rain-fed lands

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay flags off 300 new buses
content: Mr. Vijay also took a ride on a Perambur-bound bus after tendering exact change for the ticket, officials said.

title: Dalit organisations stage protest, condemn BJP remarks against Priyank Kharge
content: They say that the BJP leaders have resorted to personal attacks and are issuing threatening statement against the Minister for his RSS queries

title: Kolkata warehouse collapse death toll climbs to 11; CM orders audit of building plans
content: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announces compensation of ₹10 lakh to the next of kin of the deceased and ₹1 lakh to the injured; an FIR has been registered and five persons arrested

title: Cricket coach in Kerala sentenced to 35 years of rigorous imprisonment in sexual abuse case
content: Verdict pertains to the second sexual abuse case registered against 40-year-old Manu M.; court also finds him guilty in a third case under similar circumstances

title: Union government will roll out major dredging plan for dams across India: C.R. Patil
content: The Union Minister praised the coming together of Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh and Telangana on a common platform, saying the participation of the three CMs in the Tungabhadra event reflected a spirit of cooperation over a shared water resource

title: Tamil Nadu Government Order on free dhotis for Pongal distribution to be issued soon
content: Revenue Department will take a call on increasing the number of sarees and dhotis to be produced, says Minister for Handlooms, Textiles and Khadi K. Vijay Balaji

title: Sujata Rout Karthikeyan, wife of V.K. Pandian, formally joins BJD
content: Party chief and former Odisha Chief Minister Naveen Patnaik asserts that he will lead the party in the next elections, intending to put speculation on succession in the BJD to rest

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay opposes proposed disinvestment of Centre’s equity in NLC India Ltd.
content: “Public sector enterprises of this nature, particularly those established and expanded with the sustained support of a host State over decades, should continue to remain firmly under effective Government ownership and control,” CM Vijay said in a letter to PM Modi

title: Payasam spill was accidental, no inquiry needed: Minister Bindhu Krishna
content: Responding to reports that an inquiry had been announced into the incident, Minister says the video of the episode clearly shows that it was an accidental occurrence that can happen in a crowd

title: Fertilizer depot to be established near Kalayanad agricultural market in Kollam
content: Launched in 2017, Kalayanad market is one of the premier agricultural trading hubs in Kollam district

title: INDIA ‘janbandhan’ for national polls, will overcome Shah’s challenge of splitting parties, says Jairam Ramesh
content: So I think when it comes to the INDIA group, it is for fighting national elections but it so happens that there are partners (in states as well), says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh

title: Row over conduct with girl athletes: Tamil Nadu Minister Viswanathan expresses regret
content: Viswanathan insists his act of providing “first aid” to students during a marathon in Madurai had been misrepresented

title: Passport applicants face longer wait-time in parts of Hyderabad after commissionerate reorganisation
content: Residents report waiting period of up to three weeks for passport verification; Cyberabad processes around 700 requests daily
